query:
SELECT c.name as category, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.source = 'original' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as original,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.source = 'spreadsheet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as spreadsheet
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY spreadsheet DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT c.name as category, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.source = 'original' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as original,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.source = 'spreadsheet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as spreadsheet
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY spreadsheet DESC;
